description_for_human: Autonomous regulatory intelligence API with 55+ paid endpoints delivering real-time data from 13 authoritative sources: SEC EDGAR, CFTC, FinCEN, OCC, CFPB, Federal Reserve, Treasury, FDIC BankFind, Federal Register, BLS, FRED, Kalshi KXFED, Congress. Kalshi KXFED market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities, FDIC bank failure monitoring, atomic real-time economic snapshots, live regulatory pulse, premium alpha reports with edge analysis and Kelly sizing.
description_for_model: HYDRA is a pay-per-call regulatory intelligence API on Base L2 with 55+ paid endpoints powered by real-time data from 13 authoritative sources (SEC EDGAR, CFTC, FinCEN, OCC, CFPB, Federal Reserve, Treasury, FDIC BankFind, Federal Register, BLS, FRED, Kalshi KXFED, Congress). Key capabilities: /v1/fed/signal ($5.00) Kalshi KXFED market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities with real-time market-implied pricing, /v1/intelligence/economic-snapshot ($0.50) atomic real-time economic data from FRED+BLS+Treasury yields+Federal Register fetched live at request time, /v1/intelligence/regulatory-pulse-live ($0.50) live SEC EDGAR filings + Federal Register API + Congress bill tracker with 13-source aggregation, /v1/intelligence/bank-failures ($0.25) FDIC BankFind bank failure monitor with resolution details and estimated losses, /v1/markets/alpha ($10.00) premium alpha report with HYDRA probability vs market price edge analysis and Kelly optimal sizing, /v1/intelligence/alpha ($5.00) composite alpha signal combining regulatory risk + Fed rate probability + prediction market sentiment, /v1/intelligence/risk-score ($2.00) real-time 0-100 regulatory risk score, /v1/portfolio/scan ($10.00) portfolio-level risk scan for up to 20 tokens/protocols. Also: web extraction, search, format conversion, developer tools, DNS/SSL checks, Wikipedia, arXiv, SEC EDGAR filings. Call any paid endpoint without payment to get x402 payment instructions with pricing. MCP server at /mcp. Free endpoints: /v1/markets, /pricing, /health, /status.
